heroSubtitle: Take · Enjoy · Return — Circular economy at the beach
heroDesc: Rent or buy shared-use items by scanning a simple QR code.

footer.copyright: © {{year}} Galizano Reusa — Circular economy at the beach

home.shareDesc: Upload photos, set a rental or sale price, and place the QR code next to the item at the beach or parking.
home.scanDesc: Scan the QR with your phone, choose the rate, pay securely and enjoy the item.
home.immediateDesc: Don't want to register? Scan the QR and pay directly. A refundable deposit will be charged.
home.step1Desc: Open your camera and point at the QR code on the item
home.step2Desc: Half day, full day or purchase
home.step4Desc: Leave it where you found it when you're done

auth.clientRegDesc: By registering with your details, you don't need to pay a deposit on rentals.
auth.upgradeDesc: {{name}}, we just need your bank account and ID to activate you as a provider. Your identity will always be anonymous to clients.
auth.ofertanteRegDesc: Register your account to upload items and receive income. Your identity will always be anonymous to clients.

flash.accountCreated: Account created! As a registered user, you don't need to pay a deposit.
flash.emailExists: An account with that email already exists.
flash.nowOfertante: You're now a provider! You can start uploading items.
flash.ofertanteCreated: Provider account created! You can start uploading items.
flash.csrfError: Invalid security token. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.depositRequired: Deposit is required and must be greater than 0
validation.photosRequired: You must upload at least one photo of the item.
validation.invalidFile: Only JPEG, PNG, or WebP images are allowed.

items.descPlaceholder: Describe your item: condition, features, instructions for use...
items.depositHelper: Only charged to unregistered users. Protects your item in case of theft or damage.
items.itemCreated: Item created! You can now print the QR code.

qr.title: QR Code generated
qr.printInstructions: Print this QR and place it next to your item: {{title}}

landing.securePayment: Secure payment processed by Stripe. When finished, return the item to the same location.

dashboard.title: My Provider Panel
dashboard.noItems: You haven't added any items yet.

returns.title: Returns
returns.desc: Review returns of your rented items. The deposit is released the next day if everything is correct.
returns.returnConfirmed: Return registered. The deposit will be released tomorrow if there are no issues.
returns.incidentReported: Incident registered. The deposit has been blocked and will be transferred to your account.
returns.depositRefundError: Cannot return the deposit (already returned or blocked).

catalog.title: Available Items
catalog.desc: Browse items you can rent or buy. You can also scan the QR directly at the beach.
catalog.empty: No items available at the moment.

payment.reminder: Remember: return the item to the same location
payment.depositInfo: The deposit is automatically returned if the item is returned in good condition.
payment.processError: Error processing payment. Please try again.
payment.notConfigured: Price not configured for this transaction type.

error.title: Error {{code}}
error.notFound: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

privacy.title: Personal Data Protection
privacy.section1Text: The controller of your personal data is HC Partners, with privacy contact at privacy@hcpartners.ch.
privacy.section2Intro: When you use Galizano Reusa, we may collect the following personal data:
section2Items: Third-party authentication data (Google, Facebook) if using social login
Transaction and payment data processed through the platform
privacy.section3Intro: Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.section4Text: Processing of your data is based on contract performance (Art. 6.1.b GDPR), compliance with legal obligations (Art. 6.1.c GDPR) and, where applicable, your explicit consent (Art. 6.1.a GDPR).
privacy.section5Intro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the right to:
section5Items: Access: request a copy of your personal data.
Erasure: request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten").
Restriction: request restriction of processing of your data.
Portability: receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
Objection: object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances.
privacy.section6Text1: To exercise any of your rights, including the complete deletion of your personal data, send an email to:
privacy.section6Text2: In your request, include your full name and the email address associated with your account. We will respond within 30 days in accordance with applicable law.
privacy.section7Text: Your personal data will be retained as long as your account is active and, subsequently, for the periods required by applicable legislation to comply with tax and legal obligations.
privacy.section8Text: If you believe your data is not being processed appropriately, you have the right to file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (www.aepd.es).
